commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a default-off Feishu `sendRateLimit.minIntervalMs` config at top level and per account, then routes text, card, media, and initial streaming-card sends through a per-account/per-target pacing helper with docs and tests.

PR surface: Source +212, Tests +189, Docs +2. Total +403 across 13 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main has Feishu chunking and send paths plus reactive retry handling, but no proactive pacing config or scheduler. I did not run a live Feishu burst test in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Contributor or maintainer action is needed for real behavior proof; there is no narrow ClawSweeper repair lane because automation cannot prove the contributor's live Feishu setup.

target.title: fix(feishu): pace outbound sends per target
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

Fixes #14206.

Feishu outbound sends currently retry after the API returns rate-limit responses, but configured high-volume conversations can still burst several `im.message.create` / `im.message.reply` calls to the same Feishu target at once. That makes the first user-visible symptom a Feishu rate-limit error instead of a paced send queue.

## Why This Change Was Made

This adds an opt-in `channels.feishu.sendRateLimit.minIntervalMs` setting, with the same setting available under `channels.feishu.accounts.<id>.sendRateLimit.minIntervalMs` for per-account overrides. When configured, Feishu text, card, image, and file message sends are paced by account + receive id type + receive id. Different Feishu targets still send independently, and the default interval remains `0` so existing installs keep their current behavior unless they opt in.

## User Impact

Operators can set a small per-target send interval to avoid Feishu per-chat send bursts while keeping cross-chat throughput. Existing retry handling for Feishu 230020 / 11232 / 429 responses remains in place for server-side limits that still occur.

## Evidence

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run extensions/feishu/src/send.concurrent.test.ts extensions/feishu/src/config-schema.test.ts extensions/feishu/src/send.test.ts extensions/feishu/src/send-target.test.ts extensions/feishu/src/send.retry.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run extensions/feishu/src/outbound.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run extensions/feishu/src/reply-dispatcher.test.ts`
- `oxfmt --check extensions/feishu/src/send-rate-limit.ts extensions/feishu/src/send-target.ts extensions/feishu/src/send.ts extensions/feishu/src/media.ts extensions/feishu/src/config-schema.ts extensions/feishu/src/config-schema.test.ts extensions/feishu/src/send.concurrent.test.ts extensions/feishu/openclaw.plugin.json`
- `git diff --check`
